title: Rainbow Resource Pack
description: This resource pack changes the original weapons to colored materials for use on the 1.8.9 version of the PVP server.
body:
# Rainbow Resource Pack
## about
**This resource pack changes the original weapons to colored materials for use on the 1.8.9 version of the PVP server.**
## <font color="red"> Warning </font>
**Beta and Alpha versions may have issues, it is recommended to play the Release version.**
## Report issue
**You can ask questions here: [Click me!](https://github.com/qiubobo114514/Rainbow-Resource-Pack/issues)**
## Historical version
**You can [click here](https://github.com/qiubobo114514/Rainbow-Resource-Pack) or go to the [download page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbow-resource-pack/versions) to download historical versions.**\
